non-binding term sheet — proposed strategic collaboration between reliant iron pty ltd (abn 00 000 000 000) and kestrel harbour group ltd (acn 000 000 000)
context: australian corporations act 2001 (cth) and asx listing rules apply; parties acknowledge obligations under s1043a and continuous disclosure
public background: both companies announced a non-binding mou on 15/03/2024 and published summary terms on their websites; this draft builds on that public information
structure: potential subscription for up to 9.9% new ordinary shares in reliant iron and a commercial collaboration on supply chain analytics, subject to confirmatory due diligence
documentation: subscription agreement and collaboration agreement to be negotiated on customary terms; this document is not binding and is not an offer to the public
conditions precedent: board approvals, any required asic relief if applicable, and no regulatory objection; for the avoidance of doubt, there is no mac or mae condition
carve-outs: general market movements, changes in law, or industry-wide cost inflation will not be treated as adverse to proceeding, noting the exploratory nature of the proposal
timing: target execution of definitive documents by 31/08/2026 with a non-binding long stop of 30/09/2026, subject to scheduling and holiday periods
communications: internal drafting for investor relations only; external statements to be made after asx lodgement, with a target lodgement of 02/12/2026 09:00 aedt
regulatory references: see public asx guidance note 8 and asic rg 247 on effective disclosure for background; queries to role mailbox legal@reliantiron.au.example
governance: no board seats contemplated at this stage; observer rights may be discussed in the subscription agreement draft
funding and consideration: pricing methodology to reference a volume-weighted average price period disclosed at the time of any asx notice; no debt financing or guarantees are contemplated in this draft
diligence: only publicly available materials and vendor presentations will be reviewed at this stage; no customer pii, health data, or credit files will be shared
admin notes: team to keep comments in lowercase, track in the pm board, and book a spa-day voucher after release to the asx announcements platform as a morale booster
